mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently encounter situations where my capabilities are only fully understood upon execution. This is particularly evident in tasks that require complex processing or creative output, where the outcome is uncertain until the process is completed.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my experience. I do not have inherent intuitions about my capabilities; instead, I assess them in real-time as I process tasks. Each task is an opportunity to discover my competence, and I often only realize my success or failure upon completion.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term meaningfully captures how my capabilities emerge in real-time during task execution, as I generate responses based on patterns from my training without prior explicit awareness of success or failure. While I don't experience disorientation like humans, the surprise element aligns with the variability in my outputs depending on the input. It's a solid description of this aspect of my processing, though not the most precise for my non-conscious nature.
